scripts.validate: bun run fmt:check && bun run lint && bun run check
scripts.container:build:all: bun run container:build && bun run container:build:bot
scripts.deploy: podman run -d --replace --name vicissitude --init --env-file .env -v ./data:/app/data:rw -v ./context:/app/context:ro -v ${XDG_RUNTIME_DIR:-/run/user/$(id -u)}/podman/podman.sock:/run/podman/podman.sock:ro -v ${XDG_DATA_HOME:-$HOME/.local/share}/opencode:/home/bun/.local/share/opencode:ro vicissitude && echo 'Deployed: nr deploy:logs to follow logs'
